The '''X10 Groundcruiser''' was manufactured by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] for use by their [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]].

==Characteristics==
A six-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] long [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle, it required a single pilot to operate. It could carry six Espos and 100 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] of cargo. Capable of achieving 400 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per hour, the craft had a flight ceiling of two meters. It was unshielded, but carried a forward heavy [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]].<ref name="HSCS" />

{{Veh-stub}}
